title: pimpinella × intermedia
intro: Pimpinella × intermedia, also known as Roman chamomile, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and anxiety. The health benefits of Pimpinella × intermedia include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Roman chamomile can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or topical cream, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
